modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to transfer calls to an extension from various phone numbers

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to transfer a call to an extension, but it just wouldn't work. It seems like it doesn't matter which phone number I use, the transfer fails every time. This is really frustrating because I need to get these calls through.
short_description: Unable to transfer calls to an extension from various phone numbers
description: So, I was trying to transfer a call to an extension, but it just wouldn't work. It seems like it doesn't matter which phone number I use, the transfer fails every time. This is really frustrating because I need to get these calls through.
